use_cases: Bluetooth device connection toggle for smart device control interfaces
IoT pairing button for hardware control panels
Connectivity status indicator in device management dashboards
Wireless device activation toggle in system settings UIs
ai_summary: A Bluetooth key toggle component featuring an inset-shadow SVG icon with glow effects and decorative corner elements. The component uses a checkbox input paired with a styled button displaying a recognizable Bluetooth logo symbol, creating an interactive device connection toggle with a premium glass-morphism aesthetic.
